name: Alter
oneliner: Zero-trust identity and access control platform purpose-built for AI agents with fine-grained authorization and guardrails
finserv: Agent authentication and authorization are critical for finserv; no explicit finserv customers but directly applicable
thesis: Alter is building the zero-trust layer for AI agents — wrapping every tool call in authentication and authorization. As You becomes the infrastructure layer, this capability is needed to ensure only authorized agents can transact.
